chapter_title.en: Chapter on Trade, Its Etiquettes, Virtues, and Jurisprudence

text: : قُلْتُ لَهُ رَجُلٌ مِنْ نِيَّتِهِ اَلْوَفَاءُ وَ هُوَ إِذَا كَالَ لَمْ يُحْسِنْ أَنْ يَكِيلَ فَقَالَ "مَا يَقُولُ اَلَّذِينَ حَوْلَهُ" قَالَ قُلْتُ يَقُولُونَ لاَ يُوفِي قَالَ "هُوَ مِمَّنْ لاَ يَنْبَغِي لَهُ أَنْ يَكِيلَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3745 - Muyassir narrated from Hafs, from Abu Abdillah (as), who said: I said to him, "A man intends to be honest, but when he measures, he does not measure accurately."
He (as) asked: "What do those around him say?"
I said: "They say he does not give full measure."
He (as) said: "He is among those who should not be measuring."
